name: dock-warehouse
summary: A waterfront warehouse — high rafters, stacked crates and barrels awaiting shipment, a loading dock door, a clerk's nook by the ledger desk.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: wide rectangle, loading door to the waterside

primary_palette.note: primary cargo block filling the floor
weighing station — customs or merchant inspection
overhead lifting rig for heavy goods

story_prompts: smugglers meet after hours — the party stumbles in
stock mysteriously goes missing each night; something in the rafters
the clerk is being extorted and the party arrives during a shakedown
the warehouse is a front — stolen goods fill half the stacks

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dim interior (0.2-0.3), daylight shafts from clerestory by day

anti_patterns: crates stack against walls and in blocks — leave forklift-style aisles
the loading door is a wide opening, not a standard door — specify clearance
don't distribute cargo evenly; real warehouses have dense blocks and open floor
